race.description: Bill Jones – Life Member Mdn Plate
race.comment: THINKYAHOT (6) ran a good race on resumption to finish second, beaten 1.3 lengths over 1109m at Echuca. Has plenty of upside and will take catching. EENY MEENY (3) is a gelding by Exceedance from the stakes-winner Meikas on debut for the Griffiths yard. Expecting a strong run off a trial win. BELLABAMA (8) resumes having been around the mark last time in, especially first up when just finding one better at Warrnambool. Has since changed hands and the booking of Williams is noteworthy. LAURA ELIZA (11) is a filly by Pride Of Dubai on debut for the Mick Kent yard who has won a jumpout and can figure first time out.
